title: Something about Asuka I cant stand
display_title: Something about Asuka I cant stand
wikitext:
[]: Something about Asuka I can't stand...             Quote Post by Bobathon » Mon Jul 18, 2005 2:08 am For around 15 episodes, from her cocky remarks, to snobbish comments, to even flirting around to Kaji... does anyone notice... HER PRIDE IS SO F**CKEN ANNOYING... i hear her complain so much.. and up until then, shes one of the most hated characters in my standards... she WHINES so friggin much... and even though the world may soon be destroyed, she insists on being the best and prideful... Has she no shame? And has anyone ever told her that? I mean the scientists of course knew about her short-tempered personality that can't even control her own actions... shes such a bad person -_- yet.... In the end (movie) you just had to show her die... and then well... i feel like an idiot for posting the past paragraph above... and thats why evangelion sometimes gets me -_-

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon Jul 18, 2005 7:20 am what the hell was the point in posting that as a thread? there's nowhere to go....it's done

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 18, 2005 8:06 am You obiviously dont get the meaning behind the characters and the history of the characters, this is an intergral part of evangelion ( you need to understand the characters.)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Mon Jul 18, 2005 9:59 am hjckgcfurirtp9y[ hmio[h hyp89qwyt4kngIOF

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 10:15 am I used to hate Asuka, until I saw her mind rape scene. After that the poor girl just made perfect sence. Now I am an Asuka fan boy for life.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 11:09 am ^ Nothing gives somebody free license to be a horrible person. I'm more inclined to feel sorry for the people who have to DEAL with Asuka, as opposed to Asuka herself.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 12:01 pm Reichu wrote: ^ Nothing gives somebody free license to be a horrible person. I'm more inclined to feel sorry for the people who have to DEAL with Asuka, as opposed to Asuka herself.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 18, 2005 12:11 pm i must say that i have lived through someone like Asuka (and only for a couple days a year) and its pretty damn bad... its not as fun as it sounds

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Jul 18, 2005 12:22 pm Reichu wrote: ^ Nothing gives somebody free license to be a horrible person. I'm more inclined to feel sorry for the people who have to DEAL with Asuka, as opposed to Asuka herself.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 5:39 pm Regardless, Asuka:Reichu::antimatter:matter. If I had to live with Asuka, I don't think I could be trusted to not wring that scrawny little neck of hers. Either that, or put sedatives into her food.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 6:06 pm Reichu wrote: Regardless, Asuka:Reichu::antimatter:matter. If I had to live with Asuka, I don't think I could be trusted to not wring that scrawny little neck of hers. Either that, or put sedatives into her food.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 18, 2005 7:38 pm how exactly is that a weakness?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 7:48 pm sadsadshinji wrote: how exactly is that a weakness?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 18, 2005 8:22 pm Um... DatDude, my maternal great-grandparents were totally German.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 18, 2005 8:28 pm Reichu wrote: Um... DatDude, my maternal great-grandparents were totally German.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Tue Jul 19, 2005 5:09 am sadsadshinji wrote: i must say that i have lived through someone like Asuka (and only for a couple days a year) and its pretty damn bad... its not as fun as it sounds

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Jul 19, 2005 11:20 am DatDude wrote: Oh come on she's not that bad. Sure she's bossy and full of herself, but its not like she's a bad person or anything. She just needs to grow up emotionaly.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jul 19, 2005 11:51 am People, I'm in love with some1 like Asuka!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 19, 2005 3:06 pm well, if all those fan fictions have anything to say about the AS relationship, then Shinji is doing a fine job titus: I hope you mean like Asuka as in physically and maybe her agressive personality, because i dont think anyone would want to have a history like Asuka's

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 19, 2005 3:54 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Bump for TRVTH .

Has she no shame? And has anyone ever told her that? I mean the scientists of course knew about her short-tempered personality that can't even control her own actions... shes such a bad person -_- yet.... In the end (movie) you just had to show her die... and then well... i feel like an idiot for posting the past paragraph above... and thats why evangelion sometimes gets me -_-
